stemHtml: Why may an aircraft that is approved for a RNP or RNAV specification with a stringent accuracy requirement, NOT automatically be approved for another navigation specification that has a less stringent accuracy requirement?

options.a: Because the aircraft might NOT meet all the functional requirements.
options.b: Because monitoring and indication systems may not be suitable for that type of specification.
options.c: Because operation is only permitted for one type of specification.
options.d: Because there is only a limited number of aircraft permitted for certain navigation specification at a time.
